member.office_address: 1713 Longworth House Office Building Washington DC 20515-0604

form_analysis.form_header_text: Fiscal Year 2027 House Appropriations Programmatic Request Form
form_analysis.form_instructions_text:
To ensure Congresswoman Lauren Boebert has all the appropriate information to consider your House of Representatives Appropriations funding request, rider request, language request, or letter sign on request, and because the Congresswoman's Office is committed to maintaining the highest ethical standards, please fill out the below form and return by March 10, 2026, at 5:00 pm EST.

Please email your completed Request Form to boebert.appropriations@mail.house.gov

If you have any questions, please send an email to boebert.appropriations@mail.house.gov and a staffer from the Congresswoman's office will contact you as soon as possible.

fields.label: Requesting individual/organization: Please identify the person(s) (name and affiliation) including any background information on the affiliated organization(s)
fields.help_text: Please identify the person(s) (name and affiliation) including any background information on the affiliated organization(s)

fields.label: Formal Ask: Please include the Program/Title, FY27 Request, And Previous Appropriations, if your request was authorized in the NDAA, please note it here.
fields.help_text: Please include the Program/Title, FY27 Request, And Previous Appropriations, if your request was authorized in the NDAA, please note it here.
fields.draft_value:
* Program: NASA Science Mission Directorate (SMD)
* FY2027 Funding Request: $9,000,000,000
* FY2026 Enacted Level: $7,250,000,000
* Authorization: Title 51, U.S.C. § 20111 (NASA's organic statute)
fields.rationale: Directly incorporates the requested funding level ($9B), the FY26 enacted figure ($7.25B), and the appropriate programmatic title for the Science account.

fields.label: Requested Language: If there is any specific language you would like the Congresswoman to include in her letter to the committee to be included in the Committee report or Appropriations bill language, please include it here.
fields.help_text: If there is any specific language you would like the Congresswoman to include in her letter to the committee to be included in the Committee report or Appropriations bill language, please include it here.
fields.rationale: The provided request context explicitly states 'N/A' for both report and bill language.

fields.label: Requested Amount (if applicable): If your organization is requesting a specific amount of funding, please include it here.
fields.help_text: If your organization is requesting a specific amount of funding, please include it here.
fields.rationale: This is the exact programmatic funding ask for the Science Mission Directorate as specified in the provided reference values.

fields.label: Impact to Rep. Boebert's District: How will this funding help the constituents of Colorado's Fourth Congressional District?
fields.help_text: How will this funding help the constituents of Colorado's Fourth Congressional District?
fields.draft_value:
* Supports local aerospace industry including $100,000 in direct NASA Science obligations for CO-04 in FY2025.
* Directly benefits district employers Luna Corp LLC ($70,000) and Opterus Research and Development, Inc ($30,000).
* Strengthens the regional STEM pipeline and high-tech workforce through sustained investment in cutting-edge R&D.
* Captures significant economic ROI, with every $1 of NASA spending returning approximately $3 to the economy.
fields.rationale: Cites specific FY2025 spending data and recipient names (Luna Corp LLC and Opterus Research and Development) located in the district, combined with broader economic impact multipliers.

fields.label: Any additional notes or information?
fields.help_text: Provide any extra context or information relevant to your request.
fields.draft_value:
* Sustains U.S. leadership in space science to counter rapid expansion and norm-setting efforts by China.
* Ensures stability for the aerospace workforce following the significant disruption and personnel losses of FY2026.
* Prioritizes non-partisan, peer-reviewed science objectives as identified by the National Academies Decadal Surveys.
* Advances critical dual-use capabilities in weather forecasting and planetary defense.
fields.rationale: Utilizes strategic advocacy talking points regarding international competition, workforce stability, and the non-partisan nature of decadal survey priorities.
